name: Ranch Style Limas
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine the frozen lima beans, diced tomatoes, chopped onions, brown sugar, chili powder, salt, garlic powder, and pepper. Toss until the beans are evenly coated with the seasoning mixture. Place the seasoned beans in an ungreased baking dish and top with the crumbled bacon pieces. Bake for 3 hours, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
